## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss blog traffic growth and analytics discrepancies.](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic has increased significantly (180 clicks last week vs 50-75 previously)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Large discrepancy between Google Search Console (GSC) and Google Analytics (GA) data](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Implementation of CRO strategies and lead capture mechanisms needed](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [One Trust tool causing potential issues with cookie consent and analytics tracking](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)

## Topics

### Blog Traffic Growth

  - [Blog visitors increased from 40-50 per day to 90 on higher side](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [60% increase in blog traffic in last 28 days (430 extra visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Last week: 180 clicks (GrowthX articles) vs 50-75 clicks previously](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [On track to reach 500 total visitors per week goal](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

### Analytics Discrepancy

  - [GSC shows 454 clicks (last 7 days) vs GA showing only 35 user sessions](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Overall site: GSC reports \~2000 clicks vs GA showing 1060 sessions (organic)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [Possible reasons:](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [One Trust tool blocking analytics for users who don't consent to cookies](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [Pixel implementation issues (missing on some pages, slow load times)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
      - [Data processing delays (up to 72 hours for GSC, 24 hours for GA)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### CRO and Lead Capture

  - [Current blog pages lack email capture or lead generation mechanisms](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Recommended implementing:](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [Table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
      - [Exit pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
      - [In-content CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Typical B2B SaaS conversion rates: 0.25-0.8% for blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Jorge working on website updates, to be completed by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Need to ensure GrowthX recommendations are fully implemented](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Audit needed for One Trust categorization and pixel firing](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate analytics discrepancy (Prateek and Adam to discuss further)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=2147.0)
  - [Complete website updates and CRO implementations (Jorge, by Wednesday)](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Audit One Trust setup and pixel categorization](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [GrowthX to engage independent consultant for analytics validation](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [Implement lead capture mechanisms on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Continue monitoring traffic growth and work towards 500 visitors/week goal](https://fathom.video/share/EFszRyiVpGSXvBozWjGsvzVmQebrV83M?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
